meaning: n.地名,地名研究,部位命名法
examples: The academic field which has developed to study placenames is called toponymy.
This article discussed the historical relations between toponymy and ancient nationality in HeiLongJiang Province.
Toponymy is a newly developed branch of science which systematically studies the etymology and meaning of geographical names.
The group, with a name that translates as Feminine Toponymy, began collecting names of notable Italian women that city councils use on their street signs.
